grant_title: Electric City Fund for Scranton Parks and Historic Preservation
project_area: Parks and historic preservation projects, including City Hall renovations and Nay Aug Park's pool complex
demographic_requirements: No specific demographic requirements mentioned; open to community contributions and projects benefiting Scranton residents and visitors
eligibility_summary: The fund supports projects related to parks and historic preservation in Scranton. Eligible applicants include nonprofit organizations, local government entities, community groups, and philanthropic donors. The Scranton Area Community Foundation will manage the fund and decide on project investments. No formal application process is detailed; contributions are accepted via donations.
